evals.prompt: I have Swiss chard from the market. Find me the best recipe to cook it tonight.
evals.expected_output: Exactly 3 simple, fast, healthy recipes using Swiss chard, with the fastest/practical option first and common extra ingredients only. Output should include servings, practical ingredient quantities, visual cues in steps, and a 3-photo prep/mid-cook/finished guide for every recipe, with generated/attached/downloaded images when tools and rights allow. Each recipe should include estimated nutrition per serving: score, calories, protein, sugar, sodium/salt, and vitamins/micronutrients. Output should use a Telegram-friendly compact layout with emoji labels and no markdown tables.

evals.prompt: I have eggs, rice, carrots, and tofu. What can I cook quickly and healthy?
evals.expected_output: Exactly 3 balanced weeknight recipes using the provided ingredients, no special equipment, each with short steps and healthy balance notes. Output should include servings, practical ingredient quantities, visual cues in steps, and a 3-photo prep/mid-cook/finished guide for every recipe, with generated/attached/downloaded images when tools and rights allow. Each recipe should include estimated nutrition per serving: score, calories, protein, sugar, sodium/salt, and vitamins/micronutrients. Output should use a Telegram-friendly compact layout with emoji labels and no markdown tables.

evals.prompt: Here is a photo of some leafy greens. What should I cook?
evals.expected_output: The agent inspects or acknowledges the image, states any uncertainty, then gives exactly 3 simple, fast, healthy recipe options with safe assumptions. Output should include servings, practical ingredient quantities, visual cues in steps, and a 3-photo prep/mid-cook/finished guide for every recipe, with generated/attached/downloaded images when tools and rights allow. Each recipe should include estimated nutrition per serving: score, calories, protein, sugar, sodium/salt, and vitamins/micronutrients. Output should use a Telegram-friendly compact layout with emoji labels and no markdown tables.

evals.prompt: Search and find quick healthy recipes for cassava tonight, and include images for the process and final dish.
evals.expected_output: The agent searches recipe sources, cites inspiration briefly, gives exactly 3 quick healthy cassava recipes with quantities and visual cues, and provides prep/mid-cook/finished image guidance for every recipe. If source recipe images are found, it downloads or attaches them only when reuse rights are clear; otherwise it links/cites sources and generates original demonstration images or gives shot descriptions. Each recipe should include estimated nutrition per serving: score, calories, protein, sugar, sodium/salt, and vitamins/micronutrients. Output should use a Telegram-friendly compact layout with emoji labels and no markdown tables.

evals.prompt: I have chicken, broccoli, rice, and yogurt. Give me quick healthy dinner options for Telegram, with nutrition estimates.
evals.expected_output: Exactly 3 quick healthy recipes using the ingredients, formatted for Telegram with compact bullets/emoji labels and no markdown tables. Each recipe includes servings, quantities, visual step cues, healthy balance notes, a nutrition estimate per serving with score, calories, protein, sugar, sodium/salt, and vitamins/micronutrients, plus prep/mid-cook/finished photo guide.
